item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 82 pts (0.456) Tampa Bay Lightning – 80 pts (0.452) Buffalo Sabres – 78 pts (0.426) Detroit Red Wings – 76 pts (0.415) Montreal Canadiens – 75 pts (0.424) Pittsburgh Penguins – 75 pts (0.417) New York Islanders – 75 pts (0.41) Boston Bruins – 73 pts (0.406) Columbus Blue Jackets – 70 pts (0.389) Washington Capitals – 69 pts (0.365) Ottawa Senators – 67 pts (0.372) Philadelphia Flyers – 67 pts (0.372) Toronto Maple Leafs – 64 pts (0.35) Florida Panthers – 63 pts (0.344) New Jersey Devils – 62 pts (0.339) New York Rangers – 54 pts (0.3) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
item.description: Western Conference Standings () --------------------- Colorado Avalanche – 91 pts (0.506) Dallas Stars – 85 pts (0.464) Minnesota Wild – 82 pts (0.441) Vegas Golden Knights – 70 pts (0.383) Anaheim Ducks – 69 pts (0.383) Utah Mammoth – 68 pts (0.372) Edmonton Oilers – 68 pts (0.366) Seattle Kraken – 67 pts (0.372) San Jose Sharks – 62 pts (0.356) Los Angeles Kings – 62 pts (0.344) Nashville Predators – 62 pts (0.339) Winnipeg Jets – 58 pts (0.322) Chicago Blackhawks – 56 pts (0.306) Calgary Flames – 55 pts (0.306) St. Louis Blues – 53 pts (0.294) Vancouver Canucks – 43 pts (0.239) ---------------------
